name: AI Restaurant Scorer — Auto-Score New Restaurant

meta.description: Watches clean_data Google Sheet for new rows. For each new restaurant, calculates 5 sub-scores locally, calls Claude Haiku for uniqueness score (1-10), computes totalScore, and writes the full scoring breakdown back to the scoring tab.
setupInstructions: 1. Import this JSON into n8n (Workflows → Import from File)
2. Replace {{GOOGLE_SPREADSHEET_ID}} with your actual Sheets ID
3. Set up Google Sheets OAuth2 credential in n8n
4. Set up HTTP Header Auth credential with Anthropic API key (header: x-api-key)
5. Activate the workflow — it polls clean_data every minute for new rows
